tasks.title: Build final prompt-optimized image generation API service
acceptance: POST /api/v1/image-generations implements final response contract without internal fields
Provider adapter migrates allowed ai-tu live JSON provider capabilities without runtime importing ai-tu
No upload, multipart, image hosting, mock provider, fake image URL, or callback behavior
Reference binding and storyboard rules match SPEC
Browser test console supports the required visual E2E flow
Tests and review gate pass, or provider/visual validation is truthfully BLOCKED

tasks.title: Move professional templates from Prompt Compiler hardcoding to RAGFlow knowledge-driven enhancement
acceptance: Prompt Compiler fallback keeps only minimal safety skeleton and does not inject character four-view, scene multi-camera, prop multi-view, or storyboard left/right layout templates without enhancement
RAGFlow enhancement fields still append deterministically to compiled_prompt, including missing_constraints
RAGFlow validation discards prompt leaks, unauthorized URLs, unauthorized reference ids, non-JSON, arrays, and internal negative notes
Final V1.4 public API contract remains unchanged and does not expose internal prompt or enhancement fields
RAGFlow system prompt documentation is knowledge-driven and template details live in knowledge seed documents
Required check, test, integration, diff, review gate, codegraph, and browser evidence are fresh
